seoTitle: Diamond Beach vs Diehard — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Diamond Beach vs Diehard: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Diamond Beach and Diehard.
heading: Diamond Beach vs Diehard — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Diamond Beach, New South Wales and Diehard, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Diehard has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Diamond Beach (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Diamond Beach or Diehard safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Diamond Beach has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Diehard scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Diamond Beach scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Diehard scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Diamond Beach or Diehard?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Diehard has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.42% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
